children.name: Div
children.text: Guide each student with a visible learning path.

children.name: Div
children.text: The template highlights program depth, instructor credibility, schedule clarity, and consultation access so visitors can understand how the academy supports progress from first inquiry to long term study planning.

children.name: Div
children.text: Use repeatable sections with separated assets.

children.name: Div
children.text: Each page is assembled from focused partial layouts, while the visual layer lives in external CSS and runtime components stay in the existing JS bundle. This keeps the template self contained and easy to revise.
